hero.title: Natural honey for your business
hero.subtitle: You shouldn't be calling your supplier on Friday at 11 PM because the glaze went matte. We supply process-optimized honey with predictable consistency.
hero.imageAlt: Golden honey jar with wooden spoon

about.title: About us
about.sectionTitle: Trusted honey supplier in the Baltics
about.p1: Honeymark is a B2B honey brand managed by MB Lakštena, with 13 years of experience in the Baltic bulk trade market. We deliver natural and organically certified honey to food manufacturing, confectionery, alcoholic beverages, and bakery industries.
about.p2: Our clients — the largest food and beverage companies in the Baltic states — trust Honeymark for consistent quality, reliable deliveries, and long-term partnership approach.
about.description: HoneyMark is a process-optimized B2B honey brand engineered for European food and beverage producers. Backed by MB Lakštena's 350-ton processing capacity, we specify every line for one exact application. Because cheaper honey isn't cheaper if it ruins your batch.
about.logistics: Ergonomic 7kg and 14kg buckets compliant with EU lifting regulations. Ready-to-ship from our PL/LT hubs.

products.title: Six Lines
products.subtitle: Each line is designed for a specific production process — not for general raw material.

bakeryBase.name: Bakery Base
bakeryBase.description: Universal bakery raw material with stable Maillard reaction. Market leader in food production volumes.
bakeryBase.clients: Bakeries, confectionery manufacturers, cake and muesli producers

bakeryGlaze.name: Bakery Glaze
bakeryGlaze.description: Slow crystallizing. Preserves glossiness to the last customer. Lime and polyfloral blends.
bakeryGlaze.clients: Cake confectionery manufacturers, glazed cake producers, cream factories

bakeryGingerbread.name: Bakery Gingerbread
bakeryGingerbread.description: Dark, intense flavor blend of mustard and linseed. Pylus analysis with every batch.
bakeryGingerbread.clients: Spice cake manufacturers, traditional confectionery, exporters

marinade.name: Marinade
marinade.description: Functional pricing with EU origin guarantee. Neutral aroma that does not override marinade profiles.
marinade.clients: Meat processing companies, sauce manufacturers, marinades and pickling industry

mead.name: Mead
mead.description: Antibiotic levels below detection limit. Each batch with laboratory data and traceability.

ferment.name: Ferment
ferment.description: Organically certified. Pylus preserved. Friendly to fermentation cultures.

items.title: 13 years of experience
items.description: Continuous honey delivery to Baltic food and beverage industry since 2012. We know your production requirements.

items.title: Organically certified
items.description: We have an organic farming certificate. Every batch is tested in the lab for purity and EU food safety standards compliance.

items.title: Flexible logistics
items.description: We deliver from 100 kg boxes (7, 14, 29 kg) and drums (290 kg). Delivery across all Baltic states according to your production schedule.

pillars.title: Batch-to-Batch Stability
pillars.description: Same parameters, every time. F/G ratios and moisture levels are kept within strict technical tolerances. Documented in every Honey Passport.

pillars.title: Application-Specific
pillars.description: Six lines engineered for exact processes. From baking to fermentation, each line is tested with technologists to prevent production failures.

pillars.title: Audit-Ready Simplicity
pillars.description: Internal batch screening verified by independent FoodQS (Germany) testing. LC-MS/MS screening means you never worry about compliance.
